title: Britanium® BRP84 [Armoured] High Security Container Padlock - [Heavy Duty] - [Anti Drill Cylinder] - Also Ideal Motorbike, Shed & Garage Lock (5 Keys) Silver
features: HIGH SECURITY, ANTI DRILL CYLINDER - The container padlock is fitted with an outer steel cover to prevent snapping when faced against drills & crowbars.
HEAVY DUTY ARMOURED CASING FOR ADDED PROTECTION - Equipped with an extra outer steel casing to protect against damage from hammers and other tampering tools.

QUICK & CONVENIENT SHACKLE OPENING - The sliding bolt is fitted with a spring loaded mechanism, so the lock can be easily placed on a container lock box and other applications such as garages, sheds, motorbikes.
10MM CUT RESISTANT HARDENED STEEL SHACKLE - The shackle has been heat treated to increase toughness and cut resistance, which helps protect against damage from bolt cutters.

Made of reinforced steel that’s engineered to last, our weatherproof padlocks are renowned for outstanding British quality and providing robust protection in all conditions. For people that value security and peace of mind, Britanium indoor and outdoor padlocks are the smarter choice. Resistance Against Bolt Cutters It’s time to say goodbye to your old outdoor padlock that is vulnerable to bolt cutters. Each one of our padlocks with keys features a hardened steel shackle that helps deter thieves and is incredibly difficult to cut. What’s more, this heavy duty padlock outdoor solution has undergone a special heat treatment, reinforcing the material for even greater strength. Hammer Resistant Protection People who place importance on security love how Britanium outside padlocks can withstand harsh impacts. Our key padlocks are fabricated with heavy duty steel, making them resistant to sledgehammers as well as damage if accidentally dropped. Upgrade to a steel padlock that places the safety of your belongings front and centre. Five Spare Keys Included Save on visits to the key cutter with Britanium. Our padlock and key set includes a total of five keys per lock, giving you ample spares in case they are required. Distribute the keys among your trusted contacts or keep them as a backup for yourself, helping you save time and money. As Versatile As You More than just an outdoor padlock, our ultra durable locks can be used to bolster security in a range of different situations. The trusted choice among many to secure shipping containers and gates. Britanium's heavy duty outdoor padlock is also ideal for locking your motorcycle, bicycle, storage unit, external door or even your garden shed.
